title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Star Health Insurance - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Star Health Insurance - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, Star Health Insurance in Surat is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Star Health Insurance:
Star Health Insurance is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Star Health Insurance!
